name: Cold Broiled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken for 60 minutes. Combine the soy sauce, sherry, paprika, garlic, and hot pepper sauce in a bowl, then pour over the chicken halves. Let stand for an hour or two, turning occasionally.
2. Broil the chicken for 35-40 minutes. Remove the chicken from the marinade and brush each piece with oil. Place bone side toward the heat and broil for 13 minutes. Brush with the marinade and continue broiling for 3 more minutes.
3. Turn the chicken over, moving it a little farther from the broiling unit to prevent the skin side from blistering or burning. Brush the skin side with marinade and broil for an additional 12 minutes.
4. Continue broiling until the chicken is tender. Cool and wrap in aluminum foil before transporting to the picnic site.
